title: Control plant pests, diseases and disorders
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Control plant pests, diseases and disorders demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess pests, disease and disorders

pcs.text: Identify and record plant pests, diseases, disorders and beneficial organisms in target area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and record plant pests, diseases, disorders and beneficial organisms in target area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and record plant pests, diseases, disorders and beneficial organisms in target area.

pcs.text: Assess the scope, stage and size of the pests, diseases or disorders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess the scope, stage and size of the pests, diseases or disorders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess the scope, stage and size of the pests, diseases or disorders.

pcs.text: Determine tolerable threshold of pests, diseases or disorders according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine tolerable threshold of pests, diseases or disorders according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine tolerable threshold of pests, diseases or disorders according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Assess pests, disease and disorders

elements.title: Plan the implementation of plant pests, diseases and disorder control measures

pcs.text: Identify and select control options according to workplace requirements and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select control options according to workplace requirements and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select control options according to workplace requirements and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Select tools, equipment and machinery for control measure according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tools, equipment and machinery for control measure according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tools, equipment and machinery for control measure according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and assess health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess health and safety in the workplace hazards, risks and implement controls according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to manufacturer instructions and health and safety in the workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to manufacturer instructions and health and safety in the workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment according to manufacturer instructions and health and safety in the workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure control measures comply with health and safety in the workplace policies and environmental regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure control measures comply with health and safety in the workplace policies and environmental regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure control measures comply with health and safety in the workplace policies and environmental regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Plan the implementation of plant pests, diseases and disorder control measures

elements.title: Implement plant pests, diseases and disorder control measures

pcs.text: Coordinate control measures with work team, contractors and suppliers according to sequence and timing in consultation with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Coordinate control measures with work team, contractors and suppliers according to sequence and timing in consultation with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Coordinate control measures with work team, contractors and suppliers according to sequence and timing in consultation with supervisor.

pcs.text: Implement control measures according to workplace procedures and industry best practice
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement control measures according to workplace procedures and industry best practice?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement control measures according to workplace procedures and industry best practice.

pcs.text: Maintain records according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records according to workplace procedures and legislative and regulatory requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Implement plant pests, diseases and disorder control measures

elements.title: Monitor plant pests, diseases and disorder control methods

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor control measures to identify off-target effects.

pcs.text: Assess effectiveness of management measures against planned outcomes according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess effectiveness of management measures against planned outcomes according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adjust control methods where effectiveness has been below expectations.

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
